zh.lifeSummary: 當Christian Orchard於1407年11月29日之前出生在英國戴文亞爾時，她的父親William Orchard27歲，母親Alice Trevett27歲。她於1422年與Sir Phillip Cary結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1472年5月7日在英國薩默塞特，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特陶頓。

nameMeanings.name: Orchard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: topographic or occupational name from residence near (or perhaps employment at) an orchard, Middle English orchard (Old English ortgeard, orceard).

habitational name from any of the places called Orchard. Those in Devon and Somerset are named from Old English ortgeard, orceard (a compound of wort, wyrt ‘plant’ (later associated with Latin hortus ‘garden’) + geard ‘yard, enclosure’), while East and West Orchard near Shaftesbury in Dorset derive from Primitive Welsh ar ‘beside, in front of, facing’ + ced ‘wood’.
rare variant of Scottish   Urquhart  . Compare   Orahood  .

variants.name: Urquhart
meanings: Scottish (Ross and Cromarty): habitational name from any of various places in Scotland so called, notably the barony of Urquhart (Inverness), or places in Ross and Cromarty, Morayshire, and Fife. All are thought to derive from Pictish ar ‘on, by’ + Pictish carden ‘enclosure’ or ‘wood, copse’. Some bearers of this name trace their descent from William de Urchard, who fought for Robert the Bruce between 1297 and 1328.

variants.name: Orahood
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Orchard   3, itself a rare English variant of Scottish   Urquhart  .

History: The Orahoods can trace their origin to Alexander, Joshua, and Thomas Orahood, who in the second half of the 18th century lived in VA and are believed to come to America from Scotland. Their surname is also listed in the forms Orrahud, Arahood, Arrowhood, and Orchard, the last one being the most likely original form.

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Christian Orchard was born before 29 November 1407, in Shebbear, Devon, England, her father, William Orchard, was 27 and her mother, Alice Trevett, was 27. She married Sir Phillip Cary in 1422. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 7 May 1472, in Somerset, England, and was buried in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christian Orchard est née avant 29 novembre 1407, à Shebbear, Devon, Angleterre, son père, William Orchard, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Alice Trevett, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Phillip Cary en 1422. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 7 mai 1472, à Somerset, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Taunton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christian Orchard vor 29. November 1407 in Shebbear, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Orchard 27 und ihre Mutter Alice Trevett 27. Sie hat 1422 Sir Phillip Cary geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 7. Mai 1472 in Somerset, England und wurde in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Christian Orchardが1407年11月29日以前にイギリスデボンシェベアルで生まれた時，父William Orchardは27歳，母Alice Trevettは27歳であった。1422年にSir Phillip Caryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1472年5月7日にイギリスソメルセトで死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトタウントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Christian Orchard(이)가 1407년 11월 29일 이전 영국 데폰 셰브브이르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Orchard(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Trevett(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1422년 Sir Phillip Cary(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1472년 5월 7일 영국 서머세트에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 타운턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christian Orchard nasceu antes 29 de novembro de 1407, em Shebbear, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Orchard, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Alice Trevett, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Phillip Cary em 1422. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christian Orchard родилась перед 29 ноябрь 1407 г. в местности шеббир, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени William Orchard было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Trevett, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Phillip Cary в 1422 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 7 мая 1472 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия и была похоронена в местности таунтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
